{{CargoRelic
|name=One-Shot Wonder
|class_id=20994
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Theorized by Forerunners to anchor possibility fragments from timelines through conceptual assault. This enigmatic causality swap perturbs higher-dimensional observers, boosting soul stability.
|fame=29
|art=15
|fth=15
|civ=17
|tech=14
|ss1=Per red reward from turning the Pendulum, Snail ATK +1<br>Red reward(s) obtained: 60/60
|ss2=Per red reward from turning the Pendulum, Snail ATK +2<br>Red reward(s) obtained: 60/60
|ss3=Per red reward from turning the Pendulum, Snail ATK +3<br>Red reward(s) obtained: 60/60
|ss4=Per red reward from turning the Pendulum, Snail ATK +3<br>Red reward(s) obtained: 60/60
|ss7=Per red reward from turning the Pendulum, Snail ATK +3<br>Red reward(s) obtained: 60/60<br> (Awakened)
}}
